programs.title: A Plane Crash Recreated
programs.desc: The authors of the series analyze the most famous plane crashes.There will be witnesses' accounts, discussions of records from black boxes and reenactments of dramatic events in a modern flight simulator.

programs.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation
programs.desc: Another installment of the program about the adventures of daredevils who escaped from the hustle and bustle of civilization to the Alaskan wilderness.There they build their lives on their own terms.They must, among other things,prepare for winter.

programs.title: Life Below Zero: Next Generation
programs.desc: Another installment of the program about the adventures of daredevils who escaped from the hustle and bustle of civilization to the Alaskan wilderness.There they build their lives on their own terms.They must, among other things,prepare for winter.

programs.title: Air Crash Investigation
programs.desc: Aircraft accident reconstruction.To recreate the events that took place just before the tragedy, the creators present the situations that preceded them.The program will also include comments from specialists.
